codeReview.summary: The taren closeout review was executed correctly and thoroughly. The worker verified all three required items: state.json exists (confirmed with valid mission state showing 7 worker sessions and 4 completed features), progress_log.jsonl contains 31 entries beyond the initial mission_accepted entry, and 4 features are marked as completed. The worker delivered an explicit binary verdict of YES with clear documentation of what was proven, what failed (nothing), and a statement that Mission Control is trustworthy for larger cleanup missions. The review was honest and evidence-based, referencing actual file contents rather than making assumptions.

summary: Taren review PASSED. The closeout review successfully verified all required evidence: state.json exists with mission state tracking 7 worker sessions, progress_log.jsonl shows 31 entries demonstrating real execution activity beyond initial acceptance, and 4 features completed (m0-verify-artifacts, scrutiny-validator-m0-artifact-truth, m1-run-one-real-check, scrutiny-validator-m1-start-truth). The worker delivered an explicit binary verdict: YES - Mission Control is trustworthy for larger cleanup missions now. The review was honest, evidence-based, and complete with no blockers identified.
